fixtures.name: email confirmation

options.subject: Your application has been received
options.content:
Thank you for contacting The National Archives with your application to film or record here.

You will receive a response from us about your application within 10 working days.

The details you have provided to us are listed below.
options.signoff: If any of these are incorrect or if you have any questions regarding your enquiry, please email us at enquiry@nationalarchives.gov.uk or call +44 (0) 20 8876 3444, quoting your reference number.

fixtures.html:
Application received

Your reference number is TNA1756716690J57.

Thank you for contacting The National Archives with your application to film or record here.

You will receive a response from us about your application within 10 working days.

The details you have provided to us are listed below.

If any of these are incorrect or if you have any questions regarding your enquiry, please email us at enquiry@nationalarchives.gov.uk or call +44 (0) 20 8876 3444, quoting your reference number.
